provenance.author: verify
provenance.notes: Representative clump extracted from the 'free_bamboo_set' display set (30 culms, 37834 tris): 3 full leafy bambooBlock culms (008/011/009) re-clustered into a tight grove. Source culms were authored oversized (~42m); a uniform 0.34 scale brings the grove to a realistic ~14.3m height (unit:meter normalization; geometry untouched). Ground-center pivot; 12 textures webp-compressed (5.12MB -> 2.0MB). Author handle pending verification on the staged set; credit in THIRD-PARTY-ASSETS.md.

lod.label: mesh-near+billboard-far
lod.rationale: A mid-level bamboo clump reads as distinct vertical culms with alpha leaf fans up close, so the near band is the real mesh. Past ~120m the silhouette flattens to a tall thin stand, so the far band is a planned billboard atlas (not an octahedral impostor — the form is near-flat and dense, a single lat-lon card set captures it cheaply). Atlas not yet baked.

bands.notes: Bake a lat-lon billboard atlas from the normalized bamboo-grove mesh (tall narrow stand; a 4x2 view sphere suffices).
